name: pilotfish-agents
description: Vendored copy of Nanako0129/pilotfish's six role subagents (scout, Explore, mech-executor, executor, verifier, security-executor) for portable install. Named distinctly from upstream's "pilotfish" to avoid marketplace name collisions. The settings.json fallbackModel key and CLAUDE.md orchestration policy are not plugin-deliverable — see README.md for the manual steps.
